findings.title: Per-month breakdown dropped final month for mid-month toDate (incl. default load) — fixed bound
No 366-day cap on tax report — added cap
Zero-rated and exempt merged into one bucket (different KRA VAT-3 boxes); needs persisted tax_treatment
Standard line whose VAT rounds to 0 mis-bucketed as exempt (classifies on line_tax!=0)
UTC vs EAT period boundaries — codebase-wide convention
